panels.description:
positive value = queue is growing

near zero = workers are keeping up

negative value = workers are draining backlog

targets.expr:
sum by (tier) (
  rate(queue_ingress_total[1m])
)
-
sum by (tier) (
  rate(processed_requests_total[1m])
)

panels.title: Queue Backlog Growth Rate
Worker Failure Rate by Tier and Stage
Worker Failure Rate by Stage and Error Type
DLQ Push Attempts rate by Reason
DLQ Push Failure Rate by Reason

targets.expr:
sum by(model, version) (
  rate(nv_inference_request_duration_us[1m])
)
/
clamp_min(
  sum by(model, version) (
    rate(nv_inference_request_success[1m])
  ),
  0.001
)
/
1000

panels.title: Avg Triton Request Latency by Model/Version

panels.description:
1 = pod is ready
0 = pod is not ready
panels.title: Pod Readiness and Available Replicas
